message:
perf(core): gate all execute-path counters + tracing behind hot_path_profile_enabled() (bd-cg732)

Systematic gating of 15 unconditional atomic fetch_add calls and their
associated tracing::debug! format! allocations across all prepared-
statement execute paths (DML, query, streaming, query-row). Saves ~10-25ns
per prepared-statement execution when profiling is disabled (the common
case in benchmarks and production).

Sites gated:
- execute_prepared_with_params_after_background_status (3 sites)
- query_prepared_with_params_after_background_status (4 sites)
- query_prepared_with_row_handler_after_background_status (2 sites)
- query_prepared_row_after_background_status (4 sites)
- execute_precompiled_prepared_update_or_delete (4 sites: direct
  UPDATE/DELETE counters + fused-entry tracing in both fast + instrumented
  lanes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
